requirements.summary: Remove the background image div element from the HeroSection component
acceptanceCriteria: The div element at the specified XPath is removed from HeroSection.tsx
The hero section no longer displays the background image
The component remains functional without errors

file_operations.description: Remove the background image div element (the first child div with absolute positioning and background-image styling) from the HeroSection component while preserving the gradient overlay and content container
